pk_tuples.dose_original: 3.0 mg nalmefene HCl (2.7 mg nalmefene base) intranasal spray, one nostril
pk_tuples.notes: Study OPNT003-PK-001, Opvee nasal spray 3 mg nalmefene HCl (2.7 mg base), geometric mean Cmax. Median Tmax 0.25 h (15 min). t1/2 11.4 h, CL/F 66.9 L/h, Vz/F 1090 L.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 1.0 mg nalmefene HCl (0.9 mg base) IM injection
pk_tuples.notes: Study OPNT003-PK-001, IM nalmefene injection 1 mg HCl reference treatment, geometric mean Cmax. Median Tmax 0.333 h.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 6.0 mg nalmefene HCl (5.4 mg base) intranasal, 3 mg in each nostril
pk_tuples.notes: Study OPNT003-PK-002, Opvee 3 mg in each nostril (T2). Cmax/AUC estimated as 2x of 3 mg (Treatment A Cmax/D 3.70 × 6 mg = 22.2 ng/mL). Mean AUCinf/D 14.9 h·ng/mL/mg × 6 mg = 89.4; using narrative 2x 40.3 = ~80.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 6.0 mg nalmefene HCl (5.4 mg base) intranasal, one nostril
pk_tuples.notes: Study OPNT003-PK-002, 6 mg in one nostril (T3). Cmax/D 3.15 × 6 = 18.9 ng/mL; AUCinf/D 14.3 × 6 = 85.8; conservative approximation from T1 values.
